reviews.review_text: Very clean, excellent and very friendly management, old but super clean and airy bathrooms. Lovely outdoor chillout areas. Space was a bit tight for us getting in with a big caravan and vehicle but it was easily sorted with the help of a friendly resident moving her car for us. The location is great, next door to shops including IGA, cinemas and Pizza Hut. We took our bikes and there is a path to pick up right out the front which takes 10mins to the V wall all flat, and passes many beautiful spots to hang out. No pool, no jumping pillow etc, just a beautiful little clean park. We will be back, thank you.
